backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing IELTS test management system with CRUD operations for tests and student responses, hardcoded authentication (username: "Hexa's Beanibazar", password: "Hexas@12345"), automated scoring logic, and blob storage integration for media files.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to update frontend authentication credentials to match backend values (username: 'Hexa's Beanibazar', password: 'Hexas@12345').
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing the React application structure with test management, student response tracking, authentication, and media upload capabilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title "Hexa's Beanibazar" and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing application state (view modes: welcome/test/results/responses) with header, left sidebar (TestManagementPanel), right content area (RightPanelContainer), and footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication modal dialog component that accepts username/password input, validates credentials via onLogin callback, and triggers onSuccess callback upon successful authentication.
Modal dialog for test creation that receives AuthCredentials prop, uses useTestForm hook for form state management, and passes credentials to useCreateTest mutation when submitting.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying "Powered By Hexa's Beanibazar" text with styling.
A form component for creating and editing test questions with support for multiple question types, options management, and media upload (images/audio) with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/ReadingTestLayou: A two-panel layout component displaying a reading passage on the left and all questions on the right, with scrollable areas for both sections.
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Displays detailed information about a student's test response including scores, band estimation, submission date, and provides export/navigation functionality.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: A table-based viewer for browsing all student responses with search functionality, score/band display, and actions to view details or delete responses.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Shows test results after completion with score breakdown, IELTS band estimation, accuracy metrics, and toggleable correct answer display.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: A routing container that conditionally renders TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome screen based on the current app state.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: A modal dialog that collects student name and batch number before allowing them to start a test, with validation and keyboard support.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking interface component that handles student registration, displays test questions, manages timer and fullscreen mode, collects answers, and submits test responses. Supports both reading and standard test layouts.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Admin panel component for managing tests with search/filter functionality, displaying test list, and providing buttons to create new tests or view responses. Includes authentication modal for protected actions.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders individual test questions with support for multiple question types (multiple choice, true/false/not given, short/long answer, etc.) and displays associated media (audio/images) if present.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Session-based authentication hook with hardcoded credentials for admin access, persisting auth state to sessionStorage and providing login/logout/getCredentials functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook for managing fullscreen mode with enter/exit functions and state tracking, listening to browser fullscreen change events.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and providing authentication status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend operations including CRUD operations for tests and student responses, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Custom hook that filters student responses by student name based on a search term, returning the filtered list.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Custom hook that manages test filtering state with search term and test type filters, returning filtered tests and filter controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Custom hook managing test creation form state including title, type, instructions, and questions with validation, CRUD operations for questions, and conversion to backend Test type.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Custom hook that handles test submission logic including answer grading, score calculation, band estimation (0.0-9.0 scale), and creating student response records via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Custom hook providing timer functionality with start, pause, reset controls and formatted time display for tracking test duration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors using OKLCH variables, animations (accordion, fade, slide), container settings, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking feature requests to update authentication credentials to username 'Hexa's Beanibazar' and password 'Hexas@12345' in both frontend and backend.
